text.tspan: u2192 in this case, writes to N1, N2, N3
the value with the highest timestamp
u2192 in this case, reads from N3, N4, N5
OVERLAP: write quorum {1,2,3} u2229 read quorum {3,4,5} = {3}
N3 has the latest value u2192 reader gets it.
3 + 3 = 6 > 5 u2713 u2192 every read sees the latest committed write
If instead W=2, R=2: 2+2=4 u2264 5 u2717 u2192 NOT safe
reader could pick {4,5}, none of which saw write {1,2}
